## Validation

- [ ] Backend or contract tests were run, or this is a docs/template-only change
- [ ] Relevant API, contract, or integration smoke checks were performed
- [ ] Documentation was updated when behavior or setup changed

## Security and Data Review

- [ ] No secrets, private keys, wallet seeds, `.env` files, or generated credentials are included
- [ ] Auth, privacy, funds movement, or migration risks are described when touched
- [ ] Inputs and error paths are validated for backend-facing changes

## Contributor Notes

- [ ] The PR is scoped to one issue or one cohesive change
- [ ] The reviewer can verify the change from the description and linked tests
